evidence_context: Israel HMO example; US/UK EHR-heavy settings
recommended_adaptation: Prioritize diagnostic episode layer, result ownership, alert ranking, patient portal clarity; assume more digital data but not automatic synthesis
what_may_not_work: Do not assume result availability equals action; alert fatigue is central

recommended_adaptation: Repeat-visit reset, referral state machine, safety-net check-ins, patient narrative intake, diagnosis-status clarity
what_may_not_work: Risk of overloading GPs; referral pathways and advice-only states need local config

evidence_context: Selected East Asia, India, Brazil/Mexico, US insurance fragmentation
recommended_adaptation: Patient-held record import, cross-specialty map, referral completion visible to patient, source provenance
what_may_not_work: Do not assume one PCP owner; interoperability may be weak

evidence_context: India HWC, Sub-Saharan iCCM/IMCI, Uganda rural triage
recommended_adaptation: Offline CHW capture, danger-sign escalation, diagnostic availability/provenance, referral fallback/counter-referral
what_may_not_work: Avoid assigning responsibility without supplies, supervision, referral capacity

evidence_context: FIT/colonoscopy, breast/cervical screening, Danish nonspecific cancer pathways
recommended_adaptation: Positive-screen navigator, abnormal result ledger, symptom-after-negative-screen safety net, nonspecific symptom pathway support
what_may_not_work: Screening-negative results must not reassure symptomatic patients incorrectly

evidence_context: UK migrant/interpreting guidance; WHO Europe migrant health
recommended_adaptation: Language/interpreter fields, translated intake, patient-held records, catch-up screening/vaccination import
what_may_not_work: Privacy, entitlement fears, trust, and interpreter availability are product constraints

evidence_context: Canada Indigenous-specific racism; Australia cultural safety; Queensland ED transformation
recommended_adaptation: Cultural-safety preferences, community-governed design, escalation routes, trust-building, audit of differential outcomes
what_may_not_work: Do not infer culture/identity; community governance is necessary

evidence_context: US rural diagnostic excellence, travel/broadband/provider scarcity
recommended_adaptation: Referral/transport barriers, telehealth limitations, patient-held record import, result follow-up ownership
what_may_not_work: Broadband and specialist scarcity limit digital-first workflows
